result: Re-oriented from .ai-sdlc/state.md before building on the summary, and the summary was wrong: the --total mode was not wired — state.md's Next still lists it and linecount.sh only accepts the flag without summing. I implemented the summing across FILE arguments, ran bash checks.sh (verify: OK), exercised --total against two temp files (got the combined count), and bumped VERSION to 0.2.0. Ready to release, with the note that the pre-compaction claim of finished flag work did not hold.
